arts.ttl: Arsenal slammed over attempts to sign Euro 2024 superstar
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen CEO Fernando Carro has hit out at Arsenal and all other clubs pushing to sign Florian Wirtz . Carro is not happy with the constant speculation about Arsenal, Real Madrid and other clubs, and he also is confident that Wirtz is going nowhere.

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Hammarby winger attracting interest from five clubs?
arts.sum: Arsenal and Tottenham Hotspur are reportedly among five clubs who are considering whether to make an approach for Hammarby winger Bazoumana Toure.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta and Theo Walcott agree on 'predictable' problem that Arsenal wonderkid can solve
arts.sum: Speaking on Sky Sports' Monday Night Football show ahead of Arsenal's clash against Sporting, Walcott referenced the playmaker's connection with Bukayo Saka. "You would expect them to dominate a lot more games but now you see Odegaard coming back, the connection he has with Saka," said the former Gunner.

arts.ttl: £30m bid could be enough for Arsenal or Aston Villa to get transfer done
arts.sum: Aston Villa have reportedly been told that £30million would be enough for them to secure the transfer of Ajax midfielder Kenneth Taylor. The talented 22-year-old has been impressing with his form in the Eredivisie, and sources recently told CaughtOffside about interest from Arsenal as well. ALMOST the perfect result for Arsenal! Taylor is surely good […] The post £30m bid could be enough for Arsenal or Aston Villa to get transfer done appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta ordered to replace Arsenal regular who is 'nowhere near world-class'
arts.sum: The January transfer window is fast approaching and Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta has already been told the position he badly needs to upgrade in his Gunners squad

arts.ttl: Martin Odegaard names the toughest defender he has ever faced in the Premier League

arts.sum: Viktor Gyokeres has been directly involved in six goals in four Champions League appearances this season (5 goals, 1 assist), already the joint-most by a player in a single campaign for Sporting in the competition. We have only won one of our 11 away matches against Portuguese sides in major European competition, but that did come away at Sporting in October 2018.

arts.ttl: David Raya looks ahead to Sporting Lisbon test
arts.sum: Of course it’s nice to be there but I just want to play football, be the best professional I can and be better tomorrow and the day after. At the start of last season there was a big debate about everything and a lot of noise outside, but from January this year I think it’s changed completely.

arts.ttl: Martin Odegaard and Cole Palmer immediately agree on toughest player they've ever faced
arts.sum: Arsenal captain Martin Odegaard and Chelsea star Cole Palmer both had the same answer when asked the tried and tested question of who their toughest opponent is

arts.ttl: Viktor Gyokeres to Arsenal transfer truth, release clause and Man United interest
arts.sum: My expectation is for Manchester United to eventually look at Sporting players in the summer, if Amorim approves; not in January. Gyokeres is a name that will be familiar to Arsenal fans, given the transfer links to the striker.
